name: Nederman Holding AB (publ)
summary: Nederman Holding AB (publ) operates as an environmental technology company in North and South America, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and the Asia Pacific. It offers industrial air filtration products for heavy process industries, including metal fabrication, power generation, mineral processing, chemical, and other industries, as well as for metal fabrication, fiber-based production, process industry operations, and auto industry aftermarket sectors. The company also provides air filtration products, such as gas turbine inlet air filtration systems, and filters and related media products for the power generation and textile industries under the Nederman Pneumafil brand. In addition, it offers metal chip processing and ash handling systems to metal machining plants, metal recyclers, solid fuel fired power plants, and others under the Nederman National Conveyors brand name; and products and solutions for handling oil mist generated during metal machining. Further, the company provides technologies for evaporation, drying, and filtration of liquids; and extrusion, spheronization, feeding, and pelleting in the chemical industry under the LCI brand name. Additionally, it also supplies gas and dust analyzers for industries; and offers particulate monitors and intelligent controls for filtration systems and related material flow processes. The company also designs and engineers components and systems, as well as manufacturing, assembling, installation, and after sales services; and develops, manufactures, and markets solutions for monitoring industrial emissions and portable instruments. It sells its products through own sales organization, agents, distributors, and resellers. Nederman Holding AB (publ) was founded in 1944 and is headquartered in Helsingborg, Sweden.
